hero.pitch: Building things on the web, one commit at a time. I like clean interfaces, fast sites, and the occasional overly-animated button.

about.heading: A bit about me
about.body: I've spent the last few years building web apps professionally and side projects for fun — currently a Software Engineer at Acme Software Co., previously a Junior Developer cutting my teeth at a small startup.
